name: browser-review
description: Headless browser review agent — Playwright-based visual + functional review for PRs and deployments

steps.name: navigate
steps.description: Open the target URL (PR preview, localhost deployment, etc.)

steps.name: console_check
steps.description: Check for JS errors in console

steps.name: navigate_changed_routes
steps.description: Visit URLs corresponding to changed files in the PR

steps.name: form_flows
steps.description: Test any form submissions in changed areas

steps.name: a11y_scan
steps.description: Run accessibility scan on changed views

steps.name: report
steps.description: Generate structured review report with screenshots, console errors, a11y issues, and pass/fail verdict
